epic.title: AI-enhanced meeting notes and accountability extraction
epic.summary: Convert Minutia freeform notes into AI-enhanced notes, then turn meeting context into reviewed issues, decisions, risks, blockers, and follow-up artifacts.

strategic_positioning.one_liner: Granola makes notes better. Minutia should make notes accountable.
strategic_positioning.competitive_wedge: Granola is strongest at botless capture, transcript-backed note cleanup, templates, and chat. Minutia can win on recurring-meeting continuity by turning notes into durable owned work across series.
strategic_positioning.first_slice: Ship AI notes enhancement for completed meetings with raw note preservation, OpenRouter backend inference, preview, and functional Playwright coverage.

feature_map.why_users_love_it: No visible meeting bot joins the call, so capture feels personal and low-friction.
feature_map.minutia_response: Defer native audio capture. Start with freeform notes and transcript ingestion because Minutia already has notes_markdown and transcript_raw.

feature_map.why_users_love_it: Users can type rough notes and the AI fills in structure from transcript and calendar context.
feature_map.minutia_response: Preserve raw_notes_markdown, generate ai_notes_markdown, and let users preview before applying.

feature_map.why_users_love_it: Users can inspect why the AI wrote a point, which builds trust.
feature_map.minutia_response: Add source excerpts for suggestions and later transcript ranges.

feature_map.why_users_love_it: Different meeting types can have different summary formats.
feature_map.minutia_response: Start with one accountability template, then add series-level templates after acceptance data.

feature_map.granola_feature: AI chat within and across meetings
feature_map.why_users_love_it: Users can recall decisions, extract follow-ups, and summarize across history.
feature_map.minutia_response: Scope chat to Ask this series with citations to issues, decisions, meetings, and notes.

feature_map.why_users_love_it: Teams can organize notes and collaborate on selected sets of meetings.
feature_map.minutia_response: Use existing series and guest share surfaces. Avoid generic folders.

feature_map.granola_feature: Integrations, MCP, and API access on paid plans
feature_map.why_users_love_it: Meeting memory can flow into other tools and agent workflows.
feature_map.minutia_response: Expose AI-ready meeting and series context as stable JSON before MCP tooling.

architecture.backend_boundary: Privileged AI calls run server-side. Browser code never receives provider secrets.

user_stories.title: Preserve raw notes separately from AI-enhanced notes
user_stories.user_story: As a meeting facilitator, I want my original freeform notes preserved before AI enhancement so I can trust that AI will not destroy what I captured.
acceptance_criteria: A migration adds raw_notes_markdown, ai_notes_markdown, ai_notes_generated_at, ai_notes_model, and ai_notes_prompt_version to meetings.
Existing meetings retain notes_markdown.
Existing meetings have raw_notes_markdown initialized from notes_markdown.
Editing freeform notes continues to work without AI configured.
Saving freeform notes updates raw_notes_markdown and notes_markdown while preserving ai_notes_markdown.
TypeScript Meeting includes the new fields.
Functional Playwright coverage proves raw notes persist and AI notes are not required.

user_stories.title: Generate AI-enhanced notes through OpenRouter
user_stories.user_story: As a facilitator, I want Minutia to enhance rough meeting notes using OpenRouter so I can get structured notes without manually rewriting them.
acceptance_criteria: A server-side endpoint accepts a meeting id and verifies the signed-in user can access the meeting.
The endpoint rejects unauthenticated requests with 401.
The endpoint rejects invalid payloads with 400.
The endpoint returns 503 when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is missing.
The endpoint calls OpenRouter with model minimax/minimax-m3.
The endpoint requests JSON output and validates summary, action_items, decisions, risks, blockers, follow_ups, and open_questions arrays.
The endpoint stores ai_notes_markdown, ai_notes_generated_at, ai_notes_model, and ai_notes_prompt_version after validation.
Provider errors return safe retryable errors without exposing secrets or prompts.
API tests cover success, unauthenticated, invalid input, missing key, and malformed provider output.

user_stories.title: Preview and apply AI notes in completed meetings
user_stories.user_story: As a facilitator reviewing a completed meeting, I want to preview AI-enhanced notes before applying them so I stay in control of the meeting record.
acceptance_criteria: Completed meeting notes show an Enhance notes button when freeform notes exist.
Clicking Enhance notes opens a delightful preview panel with raw notes and AI-enhanced notes.
The preview shows summary, action items, decisions, risks, blockers, follow-ups, and open questions when present.
The user can apply AI notes as the visible meeting notes.
The user can cancel without changing notes_markdown.
Loading, empty, disabled, and provider failure states are polished.
The UI works on desktop and mobile.
Playwright covers preview, cancel, apply, missing AI configuration, and provider failure.

user_stories.title: Extract reviewable accountability suggestions
user_stories.user_story: As a facilitator, I want AI-extracted items to appear as suggestions so I can approve only the records that should become durable Minutia issues or decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Suggestions are separate from committed issues and decisions.
Each suggestion has category, title, optional owner, optional due date, confidence, and source excerpt.
Accepting a suggestion creates the correct issue or decision source as ai_suggested.
Rejecting a suggestion records rejected state.
Playwright covers accept, edit, reject, and empty state.

user_stories.title: Ask this series with cited answers
user_stories.user_story: As a recurring-meeting owner, I want to ask questions across a series so I can recover decisions, owners, and stale risks without searching manually.
acceptance_criteria: Answers are scoped to one authorized series.
Answers cite meetings, issues, decisions, or notes.
Unsupported answers say the source context does not prove the claim.
Playwright covers cited answer, unsupported answer, and unauthorized series.

release_plan.name: AI notes MVP
release_plan.demo: A completed meeting with rough notes can generate structured AI notes through OpenRouter, preview them, and apply them without losing raw notes.

release_plan.name: Accountability extraction
release_plan.demo: AI suggestions become reviewed issues and decisions.

release_plan.name: Series intelligence
release_plan.demo: Users can ask cited questions across one recurring series.

global_acceptance_criteria: Minutia remains fully usable without AI configured.
No provider secret is exposed to client code or browser-visible env vars.
Raw human notes are preserved before AI writes generated notes.
AI durable records require explicit user approval.
Every user-facing AI action has loading, success, empty, disabled, and provider failure states.
Every AI endpoint verifies auth and meeting or series access.
Functional Playwright tests cover the primary AI notes flow.
Changed files pass lint, build, targeted Playwright tests, and OSS boundary scan before release.
